events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the iconic Brian May! From stadium-rocking riffs with Queen to actual stargazing as an astrophysicist, he truly is a rock legend with a cosmic touch. What's your favourite Queen track featuring his unmistakable guitar work?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? The energy, the moves, the voice – still absolutely incredible. Here's to the man who's been rolling for over six decades!

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: MTV's Birthday
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed music forever! 'Video Killed The Radio Star' ushered in a new era. What was the first music video that truly blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and cemented their place in Britpop history. Still sounds as fresh and vital as ever. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. An unforgettable cultural moment that defined a generation. Imagine being there!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, 'The King of Rock and Roll', passed away on this day in 1977 at the age of 42. He would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering The King, Elvis Presley, who left us on this day in 1977. His music and legend continue to inspire. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur, a highly influential rapper, was tragically shot on September 7, 1996, and died on September 13, 1996. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, a true lyrical genius whose impact on music and culture is still felt today. His powerful voice was silenced far too soon.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time, passed away on this day in 1970. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. His innovative guitar work continues to inspire generations of musicians. What's your favourite Hendrix solo?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring iconic tracks and that famous zebra crossing cover, on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. From 'Come Together' to 'Here Comes the Sun', it's a masterpiece. And that album cover? Still legendary.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde! The voice of The Pretenders, still as cool and captivating as ever. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54 today! Happy Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic solo album 'Imagine' was released on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A timeless anthem for peace and unity that still resonates deeply today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple introduced the revolutionary first-generation iPod, changing how we listen to music, on this day in 2001.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? Twenty-five years ago today, Apple unveiled the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed music consumption forever. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on this day in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 'Dr. No' first hit screens. Who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles co-founder and peace activist John Lennon would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His message of peace and incredible music continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the legendary John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, he's given us some of the greatest comedy of all time. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years ago, The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A sprawling, eclectic masterpiece that showed every side of the Fab Four. What are your standout tracks?
